lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਛੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 chhant |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਸਖੀ ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਸਖੀ ਮਤੁ ਆਪਣੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਭਾਵਹ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan sakhee taj maan sakhee mat aapane preetam bhaavah |
lines.english: Renounce your pride, O my companions, renounce your egotistical pride, O my sisters, so that you may become pleasing to your Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਆਉ ਸਖੀ ਵਸਿ ਆਉ ਸਖੀ ਅਸੀ ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵਹ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee aau sakhee vas aau sakhee asee pir kaa mangal gaavah |
lines.english: Come, O my sisters, come, O my companions, and let us remain under the Lord's control. Let's sing the Songs of Bliss of our Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਬਿਕਾਰੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਸੇਵਿ ਏਕੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan mohu bikaar doojaa sev ek niranjano |
lines.english: Renounce pride, emotional attachment, corruption and duality, and serve the One Immaculate Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਗੁ ਚਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਗਲ ਦੁਰਤ ਬਿਖੰਡਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: lag charan saran deaal preetam sagal durat bikhanddano |
lines.english: Hold tight to the Sanctuary of the Feet of the Merciful Lord, your Beloved, the Destroyer of all sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸੀ ਤਜਿ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਬਿਧੀ ਨ ਧਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: hoe daas daasee taj udaasee bahurr bidhee na dhaavaa |
lines.english: Be the slave of His slaves, forsake sorrow and sadness, and do not bother with other devices.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਕਰਹੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤਾਮਿ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਗਾਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai karahu kirapaa taam mangal gaavaa |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, O Lord, please bless me with Your Mercy, that I may sing Your songs of bliss. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਜੋਹੈ ਬਹੁ ਪਰਕਾਰ ਸੁੰਦਰਿ ਮੋਹਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: oeh johai bahu parakaar sundar mohanee |
lines.english: Maya seduces in so many ways, like a beautiful enticing woman.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੈ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਟੋਹਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: amrit pria kaa naam mai andhule ttohanee |
lines.english: The Ambrosial Naam, the Name of my Beloved, is like a cane to a blind man.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਢੀਠ ਮੀਠੀ ਮਨਹਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਣ ਨ ਆਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: hoe dteetth meetthee maneh laagai naam lain na aave |
lines.english: Maya is stubborn and persistent; she seems so sweet to the mind, and then he does not chant the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨੀ ਮਹਾ ਬਚਿਤ੍ਰਿ ਚੰਚਲਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਵ ਦਿਖਾਵਏ ॥
lines.translit: mohanee mahaa bachitr chanchal anik bhaav dikhaave |
lines.english: This enticer is so incredibly beautiful and clever; she entices with countless suggestive gestures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਮੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਟੋਹਨੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai deaa dhaarahu mai naam andhule ttohanee |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, please bless me with Your Kindness, Lord; I am blind, and Your Name is my cane. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਬਨਹਿ ਤੀਰੈ ਬਰਤ ਪੂਜਾ ਬਾਟ ਘਾਟੈ ਜੋਹਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: grih baneh teerai barat poojaa baatt ghaattai johanee |
lines.english: At home, in the forest, on the banks of sacred rivers, fasting, worshipping, on the roads and on the shore, she is spying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਅਨਾਥ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਨਾਥ ਜਿਉ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਤਿਉ ਰਖਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: mohi anaath pria naath jiau jaanahu tiau rakhahu |
lines.english: I am helpless and masterless; You, O my Beloved, are my Lord and Master. As it pleases You, so do You protect me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਮੋਹਿ ਨਾਹਿ ਰੀਝਾਵਉ ਕਹਿ ਮੁਖਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: chaturaaee mohi naeh reejhaavau keh mukhahu |
lines.english: I have no wisdom or cleverness; what face should I put on to please You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਚਤੁਰਿ ਸੁਘਰਿ ਸੁਜਾਨ ਬੇਤੀ ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਨਿ ਗੁਨੁ ਨਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: neh chatur sughar sujaan betee mohi niragun gun nahee |
lines.english: I am not clever, skillful or wise; I am worthless, without any virtue at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਰੂਪ ਧੂਪ ਨ ਨੈਣ ਬੰਕੇ ਜਹ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਹ ਰਖੁ ਤੁਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: neh roop dhoop na nain banke jeh bhaavai teh rakh tuhee |
lines.english: I have no beauty or pleasing smell, no beautiful eyes. As it pleases You, please preserve me, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਜਇਅੰਪਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਕਰੁਣਾਪਤਿ ਗਤਿ ਕਿਨਿ ਲਖਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: jai jai jeianpeh sagal jaa kau karunaapat gat kin lakhahu |
lines.english: His victory is celebrated by all; how can I know the state of the Lord of Mercy?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਸੇਵ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਜਿਉ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਤਿਉ ਮੋਹਿ ਰਖਹੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai sev sevak jiau jaanahu tiau mohi rakhahu |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I am the servant of Your servants; as it pleases You, please preserve me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਤੁਮ ਨੀਰ ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਉ ਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: mohi machhulee tum neer tujh bin kiau sarai |
lines.english: I am the fish, and You are the water; without You, what can I do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਚਾਤ੍ਰਿਕ ਤੁਮੑ ਬੂੰਦ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਉ ਮੁਖਿ ਪਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: mohi chaatrik tuma boond triptau mukh parai |
lines.english: I am the rainbird, and You are the rain-drop; when it falls into my mouth, I am satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਡਿਲੇ ਲਾਡ ਲਡਾਇ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਮਿਲੁ ਹਮਾਰੀ ਹੋਇ ਗਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: laaddile laadd laddaae sabh meh mil hamaaree hoe gate |
lines.english: Touch me, and caress me, O Lord, You are in all; let me meet You, so that I may be emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖਿ ਪਰੈ ਹਰੈ ਪਿਆਸ ਮੇਰੀ ਜੀਅ ਹੀਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: mukh parai harai piaas meree jeea heea praanapate |
lines.english: When it falls into my mouth, my thirst is quenched; You are the Lord of my soul, my heart, my breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੇਲੀ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਨੀਰੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai pria sang melee machhulee neer na veesarai |4|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, O my Beloved, please unite me with Yourself; the fish never forgets the water. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੀਤਿ ਚਿਤਵਉ ਮਿਟੁ ਅੰਧਾਰੇ ਜਿਉ ਆਸ ਚਕਵੀ ਦਿਨੁ ਚਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: cheet chitvau mitt andhaare jiau aas chakavee din charai |
lines.english: In my consciousness I remember You, and the darkness is dispelled, like the chakvi duck, which longs to see the dawn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਹਮਾਰੇ ਭਾਗ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਪਿਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan hamaare bhaag ghar aaeaa pir meraa |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is my destiny; my Husband Lord has come into my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰ ਹਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸੁਖਹ ਗਾਮੀ ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਰਸੁ ਘਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: har haraa suaamee sukhah gaamee anad mangal ras ghanaa |
lines.english: My peace-giving Lord and Master has rejuvenated me, and blessed me with great joy, bliss and love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹੇ ਬੰਕ ਦੁਆਰ ਸਗਲਾ ਬਨੁ ਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sohe bank duaar sagalaa ban haraa |
lines.english: The gate of my mansion is so beautiful, and all my gardens are so green and alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵਲ ਨਵਤਨ ਨਾਹੁ ਬਾਲਾ ਕਵਨ ਰਸਨਾ ਗੁਨ ਭਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: naval navatan naahu baalaa kavan rasanaa gun bhanaa |
lines.english: My Young Husband Lord is eternally young, and His body is forever youthful; what tongue can I use to chant His Glorious Praises?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਸੇਜ ਸੋਹੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਮੋਹੀ ਸਗਲ ਸਹਸਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: meree sej sohee dekh mohee sagal sahasaa dukh haraa |
lines.english: My bed is beautiful; gazing upon Him, I am fascinated, and all my doubts and pains are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਪਇਅੰਪੈ ਮੇਰੀ ਆਸ ਪੂਰੀ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਪਰੰਪਰਾ ॥੫॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak peianpai meree aas pooree mile suaamee aparanparaa |5|1|3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, my hopes are fulfilled; my Lord and Master is unlimited. ||5||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਛੰਤ ਮੰਗਲ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 chhant mangal |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Chhant, Mangal ~ The Song Of Joy:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਪੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sundar saant deaal prabh sarab sukhaa nidh peeo |
lines.english: God is beautiful, tranquil and merciful; He is the treasure of absolute peace, my Husband Lord.
